The gate tower is the main structure of", "inscription:4": "the gate, with a pair of ceremonial columns known in Chinese as huabiao on its north side. It is also the most complete traditional central axis architectural complex in China's existing capital city. 天安门 TIAN'ANMEN GATE 天安门位于北京中轴线上，端门以南，外金水桥以北，面朝天安门广场。天安门以城楼为主体建筑，城楼北侧设一对华表，城楼南侧设石狮两对、华表一对，均以中轴线东西对称分布。天安门是明清时期颁布", "inscription:3": "诏令及现代举行重大国事活动的场所，至今仍承担着重要的礼仪功能。1949年10月1日，中华人共和国开国大典在天安门举行，见证了中华人民共和国的建立。 The Tian'anmen Gate sits on Beijing Central Axis, south of the Upright Gate and north of the Outer Jinshui Bridges, facing Tian'anmen Square. The gate tower is the main structure of", "inscription:4": "the gate, with a pair of ceremonial columns known in Chinese as huabiao on its north side. There is another pair of huabiao, joined by two pairs of stone lions, on the south side, all standing and sitting west-east of central axis symmetrically.
